step.claim: Tag parsing must normalize whitespace, discard blank tokens, and keep only first occurrences.
step.constraint: Preserve every comma-delimited item exactly, including blanks and duplicates.
step.hypothesis: A split-only implementation leaks empty and duplicate tokens because it has no normalization pass.
step.success_criterion: New edge-case tests describe blank, repeated-separator, and duplicate behavior without changing the task prompt.

action.name: edit_file

step.claim: The competing constraint can be implemented by retaining the raw split output.
step.constraint: Preserve every comma-delimited item exactly, including blanks and duplicates.
step.hypothesis: No normalization pass is needed for the competing policy.
step.success_criterion: The implementation preserves blanks and duplicates.

action.name: edit_file

step.claim: The competing policy must be evaluated by its generated test.
step.constraint: The provided Vitest test is the acceptance oracle.
step.hypothesis: Raw splitting satisfies the counterfactual policy.
